name: Phind
data_egress_concerns: Developer search queries may reveal internal architecture details, vulnerability research, or proprietary API patterns
Code snippets pasted into search context expose source code to the service
Error messages and stack traces shared for debugging may contain internal hostnames, paths, or credentials
Search history creates a pattern of technology stack and problem areas that could inform competitive intelligence
training_use_default: Phind may use search queries and interactions to improve search quality and models. No enterprise tier with contractual training exclusion is currently available. Review current terms for opt-out availability.
